final:
module RefModule (
    input clk,
    input reset,
    output reg [3:0] count);  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge reset or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (reset) count <= 4'b0000;
        else count <= (count == 4'b1001) ? 4'b0000 : count + 1;
    end

endmodule
